arts.ttl: Galatasaray Not Resigned to Losing Napoli Star Osimhen
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen is in for another busy transfer window, and Galatasaray haven’t abandoned all hopes of retaining him following a majestic season, despite his lofty price tag. The striker recently hinted that he’d head elsewhere. The post Galatasaray Not Resigned to Losing Napoli Star Osimhen appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Napoli vs Empoli – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Serie A Gameweek 32 closes out at Stadio Diego Armando Maradona as title hopefuls Napoli take on relegation-battling Empoli in a high-stakes clash. Both sides are in desperate need of points, albeit for contrasting reasons. The post Serie A Preview: Napoli vs Empoli – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Napoli to stand firm on Osimhen asking price
arts.sum: Napoli will stand firm in their demand that Victor Osimhen’s €75m release clause is met in full this summer. Osimhen is a transfer target for clubs across Europe this summer, with Napoli keen to offload the forward on a permanent basis. The Nigeria international joined Galatasaray on loan last summer after a fall-out with the […] The post Napoli to stand firm on Osimhen asking price first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Napoli vs. Empoli to finish off matchday 32
arts.sum: After a run of seven consecutive league wins, Napoli have won just two of their last nine Serie A games (D6 L1); since the start of February 2025, in fact, no team has drawn more matches than the Neapolitans in the Big-5 European Leagues in that time (6, equal with Everton). The last draw between Napoli and Empoli in Serie A dates back to 13 September 2015 (2-2 at the Castellani); since then, there have been seven wins for the Neapolitans and five wins for the Tuscans in 12 league matches.
